description: Deterministic PUSHED-ack signature fixture (v0.4, §14.4). A Hub that pushes an ack to a human's client MUST reproduce `v1` from JCS(ack_signed_context) + HMAC-SHA256(test_key); the context binds `ack_sha256` = lowercase-hex SHA-256 of JCS of the ack's { acked_at, by, in_reply_to, note, resolution_id }. Recomputing the digest from `ack` MUST equal signed_context.ack_sha256. (Pulled acks are transport-trusted and unsigned.)
obligation: Reproduce header `v1`; reproduce `ack_sha256` from `ack`; reject a tampered ack_signed_context; reject a replayed jti within the window.

ack.note: got your Ship it — resuming the deploy
